examples.title: Algorithm: Creating Android UI
examples.description: Pseudocode for creating a basic Android UI
examples.code:
ALGORITHM CreateAndroidUI
INPUT: layoutType, views
OUTPUT: inflatedLayout

BEGIN
 CREATE layout
 SET layout type to layoutType
 FOR EACH view in views
 ADD view to layout
 END FOR
 INFLATE layout
 RETURN inflatedLayout
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic steps involved in creating an Android UI, including setting the layout type and adding views.

examples.description: Java code for inflating an Android UI from an XML layout
examples.explanation: This Java code demonstrates how to inflate an Android UI from an XML layout file.
